hero.eyebrow: Automated AI audit · Made in Québec
hero.title: Find out where <accent>AI</accent> can actually help your business.
hero.sub: Answer 15 questions about your business. Within 10 minutes, get a personalized report identifying 3 to 5 concrete opportunities, their recommended tools, estimated costs, and how to get started.

problem.label: Why this exists
problem.title: AI is everywhere. No one tells you <accent>where to start</accent>.
problem.sub: For a small business, sorting the options is the hard part — not the technology itself.

cards.heading: Too many options. None obvious.
cards.text: ChatGPT. Copilot. Jasper. Avoca. Botpress. Missive. A new name every week. For a business owner, it's impossible to tell which one solves your actual problem.

cards.heading: Consultants are expensive.
cards.text: A traditional firm charges $5,000 to $15,000 for a personalized audit. Micro-businesses and solo founders don't have that budget, yet they need the same clarity.

cards.heading: Generic articles don't help.
cards.text: “Top 10 AI tools” won't tell you whether you should invest in a voice agent rather than a chatbot. The choice depends on your context, not a ranking.

how.label: How it works
how.title: From 15 questions to an <accent>actionable</accent> report.
how.sub: No meeting to schedule. No consultant to meet. Just your context and our method.

steps.title: You fill out the form
steps.desc: 15 questions about your industry, size, challenges, current tools, and budget. Designed to be completed without preparation.

steps.title: Our system analyzes your context
steps.desc: Five specialized analysis models process your answers: profile, opportunities, risks, tech compatibility, financial synthesis.

steps.title: You receive your personalized report
steps.desc: A 15 to 25-page document with 3 to 5 concrete opportunities — each including recommended tools, costs, effort, risks, and a roadmap. Downloadable as PDF or Word.

sample.label: Report excerpt · Atelier Beaulieu
sample.heading: Three opportunities identified for your plumbing shop

opportunities.name: AI voice receptionist
opportunities.desc: Captures after-hours and on-site calls. Recommended tool: AgentZap.

opportunities.name: Online booking
opportunities.desc: Replace email coordination with a Cal.com page embedded in your website.

pricing.label: Transparent pricing
pricing.title: Choose your level of <accent>support</accent>.
pricing.sub: Start with the audit. If you then want help setting up what it recommends, we're here.

a.label: Path A
a.name: Audit only
a.desc: You receive the report and configure the tools yourself.

b.label: Path B
b.name: Audit + setup
b.desc: We configure the recommended tools for you and train your team.

c.label: Path C
c.name: Custom development
c.desc: When off-the-shelf tools don't meet your specific needs.

finalCta.title: Your business deserves better than a <accent>trend list</accent>.
finalCta.sub: A personalized audit. In 10 minutes. For $149. No meeting required.
